dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.savingsPotentialHint: Upcoming monthly reserves based on seasonal trends.
dashboard.fsiCritical: High risk cash burn. Action required.
dashboard.autoSweepHelp: Auto-sweep moves 15% of all incomes logged under the Incomes tab directly to the Vault. Configure sweep rates and UPI locks in the Profile tab.
dashboard.projectionUnavailable: Projection data is unavailable. Add more income/expense history to activate.

income.title: Income
income.historicalLedgerSubtitle: Full record of gig payouts, business contracts, and client deposits.

expense.title: Expense
expense.disbursementsSubtitle: Full record of outgoing rent, bills, shopping, food and utility costs.

stability.title: Financial Stability
stability.incomeConsistencyHint: Based on client deposit intervals and gig contract durations.
stability.burnRateHint: Proportion of total income spent on disbursements this month.
stability.runwayHint: How long current balance lasts based on this month's cash burn.
stability.reportSubtitle: Volatility-aware analysis of your income streams, fixed outflows, and recommended buffer.
stability.chatSubtitle: Ask about savings, budgets, risk, and anomaly alerts from your live data.
stability.copilotGreeting: Hello! I'm your FinGuard API Advisor. Ask me about savings, investments, budgets, or risk based on your income, FSI score, and alerts.
stability.localSummary: Based on your FSI of {{score}}, balance {{balance}}, and {{risk}} risk — focus on building a 2-month buffer before discretionary spending.
stability.localSavingsPlan:
### 💰 Savings Plan
Balance **{{balance}}**, savings potential **{{savings}}/mo**. Auto-sweep 15% of payouts and target a **{{runway}}-month** runway.
stability.localInvestGuidance:
### 📈 Investment Guidance
Start SIPs only after a 3-month emergency buffer. With **{{savings}}/mo** capacity, prefer large-cap index funds and RDs over high-risk trades.
stability.localSummaryFull:
### 🛡️ FinGuard Summary
**{{profession}}** · FSI **{{score}}/100** ({{risk}})
Balance **{{balance}}** · Runway **{{runway}} months**
Ask about savings, investing, budgets, or anomaly alerts. (Offline local mode)

anomaly.title: Anomaly Detection
anomaly.shieldActiveBanner: SHIELD ACTIVE: Your system status is secure. No critical threats pending.
anomaly.auditLogSubtitle: Real-time heuristic protection flagging unusual velocity and outlier transactions.
anomaly.noAnomalies: FinGuard Shield status is green. No suspicious anomalies detected.

messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this record?

ui.loginSubtitle: Enter your username and password to continue.
ui.registerSubtitle: Start tracking & securing your income stability
ui.loginHeroBody: Track income and expenses, review stability, and get alerts when spending looks unusual.
ui.loginPointStability: Stability index from your income and fixed costs
ui.loginPointLedger: Income, expenses, and savings in one place
ui.loginFootnote: Sign in with the username and password provided for your account.
ui.featureStabilityBody: Calculates a dynamic FSI Score using standard deviation of incomes and monthly fixed burns to recommend accurate savings buffers.
ui.featureShieldBody: Identifies double UPI velocity spikes and large category outliers instantly to shield your hard-earned funds.
ui.featureLedgerBody: Organizes erratic income flows, gig payouts, and recurring expenses in one clean dashboard with interactive charts.
ui.selectBankPrompt: Select your primary financial institution to initiate the secure open banking data fetch:
ui.otpHint: Enter the test key 123456 to authenticate the linkage.
ui.invalidOtp: Invalid OTP. Please check the code and try again.

profile.bankLinkSecurityNote: Secure read-only consent flow. Never share bank passwords, keys, or OTPs.
profile.autoSweepDescription: Automatically sweeps 15% of all incomes to Vault
profile.upiCeilingDescription: Enforces strict limit warnings on outflows

modals.bankConnectMobile: Connecting to {{bank}}. Enter your bank-registered mobile number to request consent.
modals.consentOtpPrompt: Sahamati has requested consent to link accounts matching +91 {{mobile}} at {{bank}}.
modals.bankLinkSuccessBody: Your {{bank}} savings account has been successfully linked. Starting balance imported.

alerts.profileSyncFailed: Could not sync profile to API. Local changes were saved.
alerts.authUnavailable: The authentication service is currently unavailable. Please try again when the service is restored.
alerts.registrationUnavailable: Registration is currently unavailable because the authentication service cannot be reached.
alerts.bankLinkedMessage: {{bank}} account ({{account}}) connected. Imported starting balance of {{amount}}.
alerts.ceilingExceeded: Ceiling Exceeded: Monthly outflows crossed your configured UPI limit.
alerts.ceilingExceededDetail: Ceiling Exceeded: Monthly outflows ({{expense}}) breach your configured limit of {{limit}}.
alerts.suspiciousExpense: Suspicious activity flagged: Expense of {{amount}} in {{category}}.

receipt.title: Receipt Scanner
receipt.uploadHint: Upload a clear photo of a receipt. OCR will extract merchant, amount, and date for review.
receipt.success: Receipt scanned. Review and edit the extracted fields below.
receipt.error: Could not read this receipt. Try a clearer image or enter details manually.
receipt.invalidFile: Please upload a valid image file (JPG, PNG, WEBP).
receipt.waiting: Upload a receipt image to begin scanning.
receipt.applied: Expense form prefilled. Review and save the entry.
receipt.amountRequired: Enter an amount before applying to the expense form.

pdf.title: FinGuard Financial Report
pdf.bucketStatusReady: Ready to release to active goals.

insights.title: AI Spending Insights
insights.subtitle: Rule-based analysis from your income, expenses, and stability data.
insights.reportError: Could not generate the PDF report. Please try again.

burnRate.title: Spending vs Income
burnRate.empty: Add income and expense records to calculate your spending ratio.

savings.title: Savings Outlook
savings.message: Estimated savings rate is {{rate}}% with {{potential}} potential reserves.
savings.negative: Expenses exceed income — prioritize reducing outflows this month.

expenseTrend.title: Recent Spending Trend
expenseTrend.up: Recent expenses are up {{pct}}% compared with earlier entries.
expenseTrend.down: Recent expenses are down {{pct}}% — spending is easing.
expenseTrend.stable: Spending has been relatively steady across recent transactions.

incomeStability.title: Income Stability
incomeStability.strong: {{count}} income entries logged — diversified inflows support a stronger FSI.
incomeStability.limited: Limited income entries detected. Log all gig and freelance payouts for accurate stability scoring.
incomeStability.none: No income transactions yet. Add income records to assess cash-flow stability.

fsi.title: FSI Improvement
fsi.healthy: FSI is {{score}} ({{risk}} risk). Keep a 2-month buffer for volatility.
fsi.moderate: FSI is {{score}}. Increase reserves and lower fixed-cost ratio to reach 80+.
fsi.low: FSI is {{score}} ({{risk}} risk). Build emergency savings before discretionary spending.

runway.title: Cash Runway
runway.message: Balance of {{balance}} may cover less than half a month at current spend levels.

target.title: Savings Target
target.onTrack: On track toward your {{target}} monthly savings target.

recommendations.reduceSpending: Reduce discretionary spending until expenses stay below 80% of income.
recommendations.maintainSavings: Maintain your current savings rate and move surplus into your stability buffer.
recommendations.aimSavings: Aim to save at least 15-20% of monthly income for irregular cash flow.
recommendations.buildEmergency: Build a 2-3 month emergency fund to improve your Financial Stability Index.
recommendations.trackFixed: Track fixed costs closely and avoid large one-time purchases this month.
recommendations.fsiHealthy: Your FSI is healthy — consider allocating extra savings toward long-term goals.
recommendations.reviewCategory: Review {{category}} spending — your highest expense category at {{amount}}.
recommendations.belowTarget: You are below your savings target of {{target}}. Trim non-essential expenses.
recommendations.reviewAlerts: Review active anomaly alerts and verify recent high-value transactions.

savings.title: Savings
savings.bucketDescription: Based on your safe monthly savings of {{recommendedMonthlySavings}}, allocate {{vaultAllocation}} to the reserve vault and {{goalAllocation}} to active goals.
savings.reserveNotePositive: Positive net worth means your reserve contribution can stay at 15% of recommended savings.
savings.reserveNoteNegative: Negative net worth means lower reserve contribution (10%) until your balance recovers.
savings.releaseReady: Ready to release to active goals.
savings.smartAdvisorSubtitle: Based on your projected 6-month cashflow, you can safely set aside:
savings.autoRoundUpDescription: Automatically rounds up your expenses to the nearest Rs 10 and saves the spare change to your active goals!
savings.noGoalsYet: No savings goals created yet. Set one up to start saving!
